title: Great Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Great Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Great Learning, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Great Learning:
Great Learning is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning!
